---
id: attachment-demo
title: Attachments Demo
---

import { MetaBlock, RunbookStep, InfoPanel } from '@site/src/components/PageLayouts';
import { AttachmentPanel } from '@site/src/components/PageLayouts/wave6';

export const envPreview = `# Pipeline Server — Production
ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=sk-ant-api03-[REDACTED]
LLM_PROVIDER=anthropic
LOG_LEVEL=info
PORT=8000
SLIDEV_PORT=3030
MAX_CONCURRENT_JOBS=4
JOB_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=120`;

export const docusaurusConfigPreview = `import type { Config } from '@docusaurus/types';

const config: Config = {
  title: 'DocSlide AI',
  url: 'https://docs.internal.barclays.com',
  themes: ['@docusaurus/theme-mermaid'],
  markdown: { mermaid: true },
  themeConfig: {
    mermaid: {
      theme: { light: 'neutral', dark: 'dark' },
    },
  },
};

export default config;`;

export const yamlPreview = `pipeline:
  name: docusaurus-to-slidev
  version: 1.4.0
  timeout_seconds: 120

phases:
  extraction:
    agents: [mdx_file_reader, mdx_cleaner, text_extractor]
  content:
    agents: [content_chunker, content_type_classifier, prose_condenser]
  design:
    agents: [layout_selector, code_slide_agent, transition_agent]
  assembly:
    agents: [frontmatter_generator, slide_assembler, validator_agent]

llm:
  provider: anthropic
  model: claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022
  temperature: 0.3`;

export const pythonPreview = `from typing import TypedDict

class PipelineState(TypedDict):
    source_path: str
    output_dir: str
    raw_content: str
    cleaned_content: str
    base_directory: str
    headings: list
    code_blocks: list
    attachments: list
    chunks: list
    slides: list
    pacing_report: dict
    frontmatter: str
    summary_slide: str
    output_path: str
    validation_errors: list`;

export const bashPreview = `#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
PREV_TAG="\${1:-v1.3.2}"
echo "Rolling back to $PREV_TAG..."
pkill -f "python server.py" || true
sleep 2
git fetch --tags
git checkout "tags/$PREV_TAG" -- server.py agents/ tools/
pip install -r requirements.txt --quiet
nohup python server.py > /var/log/pipeline-server.log 2>&1 &
echo "Rollback complete. PID: $!"`;

export const logPreview = `2026-05-28 09:00:01 INFO  server.py:42   Pipeline server started. PID=18821
2026-05-28 09:12:33 INFO  graph.py:88    Job started: docs/architecture.mdx
2026-05-28 09:13:05 INFO  graph.py:88    Job started: docs/api-reference.mdx
2026-05-28 09:14:11 WARN  assembly.py:61 Memory pressure detected: 1.8GB / 2.0GB
2026-05-28 09:14:18 ERROR server.py:99   OOMKilled — process exceeded memory limit
2026-05-28 09:14:18 ERROR server.py:100  Active jobs lost: 3
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "server.py", line 99, in run_pipeline
    result = pipeline.invoke(state)
MemoryError: Unable to allocate 512 MiB`;

export const mdPreview = `# Release Notes — v1.4.0 (2026-06-07)

## Breaking Changes
- LangGraph 0.2.x: StateGraph API changed
- Pydantic v2: .dict() removed, use .model_dump()

## New Features
- AttachmentPanel component across all layouts
- Dark mode Mermaid diagrams
- EnvironmentReference secret masking

## Bug Fixes
- InfoPanel and RunbookStep respect dark mode
- Architecture Diagram no white box in dark mode`;

<MetaBlock owner="Varun Pritham" team="Platform" status="live" lastUpdated="2026-06-03" tags={['attachments','demo']} />

# Attachment Panel — All File Types

<InfoPanel type="info" title="What this page tests">
  Every supported attachment kind — images, video (YouTube + native), PDF, Word, PowerPoint, spreadsheet, ZIP/tar, config files, code, and plain text. File type is auto-detected from the extension.
</InfoPanel>

---
